title: RGBD-GAN: Unsupervised 3D Representation Learning from Natural Image Datasets via RGBD Image Synthesis
titleZh: RGBD-GAN：通过RGBD图像合成从自然图像数据集进行无监督3D表示学习

abstract.zh: We propose RGBD-GAN, a generative model that achieves unsupervised 3D representation learning from 2D image datasets by synthesizing RGBD images. The method enables camera-parameter–conditional image and depth generation without any 3D annotations (no poses, depths, or multi-view supervision) by training a generator conditioned on camera parameters together with an explicit 3D consistency loss between two generated RGBD images from different camera parameters. The loss is simple, compatible with various generator architectures (e.g., DCGAN, PGGAN, StyleGAN, DeepVoxels), and yields disentanglement of camera pose and image content while producing consistent depth maps.

method.zh: Core pipeline: (1) an RGBD image generator conditioned on camera parameters c that outputs an RGB image GRGB(z,c) and a depth map GD(z,c) from latent z; (2) an RGB image discriminator applying adversarial loss only on RGB channels; (3) a self-supervised 3D consistency loss that enforces geometric consistency between two generated RGBD images at sampled camera parameters c1 and c2. The consistency loss warps pixels between views using depth and camera transforms (projection + bilinear sampling) and minimizes L1 differences for color and projected depth: L3D = E_{z,c1,c2}[ (1/3HW)||GRGB(z,c1) - warp(GRGB(z,c2), c1→2)||1 + (1/HW)||projection(GD(z,c1), c1→2) - warp(GD(z,c2), c1→2)||1 ]. Occlusion-aware gradient masking is used to avoid incorrect gradients for occluded pixels; a depth lower-bound regularizer prevents trivial zero-depth solutions. Final generator objective: LG = LGAN + λ3D L3D + λdepth Ldepth. The method is architecture-agnostic and can condition arbitrary image generators on camera parameters; camera parameters are sampled from a dataset-appropriate distribution (small viewpoint changes limited, e.g., Δc ≤ 30°).

conclusion.original:

However, this is inappropriate, as IS and FID are estimated in the feature space of a pre-trained CNN, and they can- not consider the 3D world geometry. Therefore, the evaluation of the generated RGBD with the 3D space is unattainable. Instead, we evaluated the color and depth consistency across the views to quantitatively compare the RGBD images generated by different methods. For the point clouds generated from the same latent vector z, but different camera parameters c, all points should be on a single surface in the 3D space. Therefore, by calculating the variation of the generated RGBD across the views, the 3D consistency can be quantitatively evaluated. We calculated the variance of the point clouds for generated images as Vdepth andVcolor in Table 1. The details are provided in the appendix. notably, these values cannot be calculated for PGGAN and StyleGAN without 3D loss, and HoloGAN–like method. The results show that DeepV oxels with 3D loss exhibited the best scores, due to the strong inductive bias of the 3D–latent–representations. Compared to DeepV oxels without 3D loss, DeepV oxels with 3D loss generated consistent color and depth, exhibiting the effectiveness of the proposed loss. 5 C ONCLUSION We herein proposed an RGBD image synthesis technique for camera parameter–conditional image generation. Although the proposed method does not require any labeled dataset, it can explicitly con- 9

Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2020 trol the camera parameters of generated images and generate consistent depth images. The method does not limit the generator architecture, and can be used to condition any type of image generator on camera parameters. As the proposed method
conclusion.zh: We proposed an RGBD image synthesis technique for camera-parameter–conditional image generation that learns from unlabeled RGB images. Using an explicit self-supervised 3D consistency loss between two RGBD images generated at different camera parameters, the method disentangles camera pose from image content and produces consistent depth images without depth or pose supervision. The loss is simple and agnostic to generator architecture, so any image generator can be conditioned on camera parameters. For quantitative evaluation of 3D consistency, we measure cross-view color and depth consistency (variances of reconstructed point clouds) rather than 2D metrics like IS/FID; experiments show the proposed 3D loss substantially improves inter-view color and depth consistency.

takeawaysZh: 提出了通过生成 RGBD 图进行无监督 3D 表示学习的方法，无需相机位姿、深度或多视图标注即可学习到可控的视角与深度。
核心创新是自监督的 3D 一致性损失：通过在不同相机参数下对生成的 RGBD 图进行投影与重采样，约束颜色与深度在三维空间上的一致性。
方法与生成器架构无关，可在多种 GAN 架构（PGGAN、StyleGAN、DeepVoxels 等）上使用，实现相机参数条件化生成和位姿—内容解缠。
